description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and a detached double garage. The front facade features a symmetrical arrangement with large rectangular windows and a central arched doorway, while the rear includes a spacious patio area, swimming pool, and outdoor seating. The house is surrounded by a neatly manicured green lawn and has multiple entry points, including sliding glass doors at the back. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of black and white, giving the structure a bold, contemporary appearance. The window arrangement is regular and horizontal, with large panes providing ample natural light. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and functional outdoor amenities.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a detached garage, and a backyard pool, finished in black and white. The design features clean lines, symmetrical facades, and spacious outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with an arched doorway, large windows, and the attached double garage on the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard pool, patio area, and sliding glass doors leading into the house.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the back of the garage, additional windows, and the full extent of the backyard patio and pool.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the rear of the garage and the back side of the house with fewer windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched doorway with a simple, flat entry path and no porch or columns
